subject: (no subject)
body: I just had a disturbing conversation with your wife,, i would appreciate a call, , she thought that I owed you money for spending time on guermante, hotel lambert, , the two projects of the architectural firm.. I suggested that we engage a third party to make an independent judgement , and she thought that was very unfair,
